_comment: TEMPLATE for data/ebay-listing.config.json (gitignored — SERVER-OWNED so the settings dashboard's runtime edits never collide with git pulls). lib/listings.mjs seeds it from this file on boot if missing. Holds the STABLE per-account IDs that publishOffer needs (business-policy IDs + merchant location) plus listing defaults. Policy/location IDs are filled in by POST /api/listings/account/bootstrap. Not secret; no tokens live here (Golden Rule 2).
